title: cassuvium atrum
intro: Cassuvium atrum, also known as Cassia auriculata, is a flowering plant native to tropical and subtropical regions, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cassuvium atrum include reducing inflammation and pain, treating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, powders, and infusions, which can be taken internally to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
